verificationManifest.title: AI-assisted research brief on content provenance
verificationManifest.scope: Full document, single author, single review pass.

authority.basis: Direct production from cited sources with human review pending.

provenanceChain.description: Author provided source list and outline.
Agent drafted brief from provided sources.

claims.name: sources-cited
claims.value: all cited sources are public and linked

claims.name: ai-contribution
claims.value: drafting and summarization only; no factual claims invented

rules: Every factual claim must trace to a cited public source.
AI contribution must be disclosed in attestationSpec.claims.
